pi_items.source: Inspection of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh - variable is referenced throughout task initialization and result export
Verified by cloning Apache Commons Lang from https://github.com/apache/commons-lang.git at tag rel/commons-lang-3.14.0 and examining directory structure

Verified by: (1) examining setup_task.sh which explicitly copies only these 5 files, (2) cloning Apache Commons Lang 3.14.0 and confirming these files exist in tuple package, (3) task description explicitly states 'It contains 5 Java source files' with these names. Note: The actual Apache Commons Lang 3.14.0 repository also contains MutableTriple.java and package-info.java in this package, but the task intentionally excludes these.

Inspection of setup_task.sh shows this file is never created. Inspection of verifier.py shows this file is never read or referenced. The verifier.py instead dynamically counts classes and methods at runtime using regex patterns on the source files.

Verified by examining setup_task.sh lines 60-64 which create this file by computing sha256sum of each stripped source file. Verified by examining verifier.py lines 149-162 which reads and uses this file to detect file modifications.

pi_items.verified_value: 5 files with totals: 5 public classes, 52 public/protected methods, 80 javadoc blocks (in original unstripped source)
pi_items.source: Verified by parsing all 5 Java source files from Apache Commons Lang 3.14.0 using Python regex: Files are Pair.java (1 class, 15 methods), ImmutablePair.java (1 class, 10 methods), MutablePair.java (1 class, 9 methods), Triple.java (1 class, 11 methods), ImmutableTriple.java (1 class, 7 methods)

Verified by cloning https://github.com/apache/commons-lang.git at branch rel/commons-lang-3.14.0 successfully, and confirming all 5 specified source files exist in src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/tuple/
Verified by web search that Maven Javadoc Plugin 3.6.3 is a real release, confirmed by Apache Maven announcement and GitHub releases page. Version 3.6.3 fixed issues MJAVADOC-682 and MJAVADOC-780.
Verified by web search that Maven Compiler Plugin 3.11.0 exists, published on 2023-02-14. Available on Maven Central Repository.
Verified in setup_task.sh: maven.compiler.source=17, maven.compiler.target=17, and JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from Apache Commons Lang 3.14.0, cloned from GitHub at tag rel/commons-lang-3.14.0. The task focuses on 5 specific Java files from the tuple package (Pair.java, ImmutablePair.java, MutablePair.java, Triple.java, ImmutableTriple.java), which contain 5 public classes and 52 public/protected methods total. The setup script strips all existing Javadoc from these files and saves checksums to /tmp/ground_truth/stripped_checksums.txt for modification detection. The task uses Maven with Java 17 compilation, Maven Compiler Plugin 3.11.0, and Maven Javadoc Plugin 3.6.3. A metadata field 'ground_truth_counts_file' references /tmp/ground_truth/api_counts.txt but this file is never created or used in the actual task - instead, the verifier dynamically counts classes and methods at runtime.
